top_findings.summary: The skill requests Google Calendar scope (https://www.googleapis.com/auth/calendar) in addition to the necessary Google Contacts scope. For a contacts management skill that performs CRUD operations on contacts, calendar access is unrelated and excessive. The skill's stated purpose is "searching, viewing, creating, updating, or deleting contacts in Google Contacts" - calendar data is not needed for this functionality. While the documentation mentions shared authentication with a calendar skill, forcing users to grant calendar permissions to use contacts management constitutes permission overreach.
